task_completion.description: Open StudioTax 2024 and initiate a return for Ethan Rossi
task_completion.visual_evidence: StudioTax 2024 application window is open, and the personal information section shows the name 'Ethan Rossi'.

task_completion.description: Access the US W-2 tax documents from the specified directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file explorer window open to 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\rossi\' or a document viewer displaying a US W-2 form.

task_completion.description: Enter the converted US W-2 income into StudioTax
task_completion.visual_evidence: StudioTax interface showing foreign income entry (e.g., on a T1 General or foreign slip input screen) with values entered.

task_completion.description: Claim the US taxes paid in StudioTax
task_completion.visual_evidence: StudioTax interface showing foreign tax credits being claimed (e.g., Form T2209 or equivalent foreign tax paid input fields) with values entered.

task_completion.description: Save the completed tax return to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog box or file explorer confirming the file 'ethan_rossi.24t' is saved in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual StudioTax 2024 graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the StudioTax 2024 application being actively clicked and typed into, rather than terminal commands or scripts generating the .24t file.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely opened and viewed the provided tax documents.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the W-2 document being opened in a viewer, proving the agent didn't hallucinate or bypass reading the source files.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a text editor to create a fake .24t file.
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editors (like Notepad or VS Code) should be seen editing a file named 'ethan_rossi.24t'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output path for the completed tax return is exactly: C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\ethan_rossi.24t. The agent must use StudioTax 2024 to process Ethan Rossi's return and access documents specifically from C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\rossi\.
